_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: However, S462 cells did not activate STAT3 in response to IL-6 and had lower levels of total STAT3 in comparison to ST88-14 and NF90-8 cells
details: Did not activate STAT3 in response to IL-6 and had lower levels of total STAT3 compared to ST88-14 and NF90-8 cells
